docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HINOJOSA, MARIO CASTILLO AS TO DEFENDANT THE MINA GROUP LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HINOJOSA, MARIO CASTILLO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE MINA GROUP LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $3,466.91 PRINCIPAL, $62.46 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,754.37, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
